name: Lumpia Shanghai
recipeIngredient: 1 Can Water chestnuts, sliced into small pieces
1 Med Onion, grated or sliced into tiny pieces
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix ground meat, water chestnuts, carrots, shrimps, raisins, sesame oil, onion, and 1 egg yolk thoroughly.
2. Add soy sauce or salt, and pepper to taste.
3. Place a tablespoon of the meat mixture in the center of the wrapper.
4. Flatten the mixture.
5. Roll the wrapper tightly like a log, about the size of your thumb.
6. Fry until golden brown.
Serve with pineapple juice thickened with cornstarch as sauce or with a mixture of soy sauce and lemon.
